name: Story Help
description: Get advice on what to do next in your writing project or ask TALE Method questions.

name: Create SRD
description: Expert guided facilitation to create your Story Requirements Document — the foundation for your entire project.

name: Create Story Bible
description: Create the Story Bible — single source of truth for characters, world, timeline, and continuity.

name: Establish Narrative Voice
description: Define and document narrative voice and prose style for this project through guided elicitation and sample generation.

name: Create Story Structure
description: Design complete story structure from premise to resolution using proven frameworks.

name: Chapter Planning
description: Create detailed chapter-by-chapter outline with beats and objectives.

name: Character Arcs
description: Map character development arcs to story progression.

name: Genre Compliance
description: Ensure story meets genre expectations while maintaining originality.

name: Create Character Profiles
description: Develop comprehensive character profiles with psychology and motivation.

name: Design Character Arcs
description: Map character growth and change throughout story.

name: Dialogue Voice
description: Create distinct dialogue patterns and voice for each character.

name: Character Relationships
description: Design character dynamics and relationship evolution.

name: Character Consistency
description: Review character consistency across scenes and chapters.

name: Create World
description: Build comprehensive world foundation.

name: Develop Culture
description: Create detailed culture or society.

name: Magic System
description: Design consistent magic or technology system.

name: Location Detail
description: Develop specific location in depth.

name: World Consistency
description: Check world consistency across manuscript.

name: Pacing Analysis
description: Review and optimize story pacing and rhythm.

name: Structure Analysis
description: Analyze plot architecture and story structure.

name: Write Chapter
description: Write complete chapter from outline and story beats. Repeat per chapter: Write → Enrich → Review → Revise if needed.

name: Write Scene
description: Write individual scene with specific objectives.

name: Revise Chapter
description: Revise existing chapter based on editorial feedback.

name: Voice Matching
description: Analyze and match established narrative voice.

name: Expand Scene
description: Expand thin or rushed scene with more detail and depth.

name: Enrich Chapter
description: Add descriptive depth and sensory detail to chapter.

name: Worldbuild Scene
description: Deepen world immersion in specific scene.

name: Enhance Atmosphere
description: Strengthen mood and atmospheric elements.

name: Sensory Audit
description: Audit and balance sensory engagement across chapter.

name: Character Presence
description: Enhance character physical and emotional presence.

name: Chapter Review
description: Comprehensive review of chapter with improvement suggestions. Run after each chapter write+enrich cycle.

name: Prose Quality Audit
description: Quantitative metrics (TTR, sentence length, complexity) and AI-generic pattern detection to validate prose quality and ensure authentic voice.

name: Scene Review
description: Focused review of individual scene.

name: Dialogue Review
description: Specialized review of dialogue authenticity and effectiveness.

name: Continuity Check
description: Verify continuity against story bible and previous content.

name: Reader Experience
description: Evaluate chapter from reader engagement perspective.

name: Improvement Roadmap
description: Create prioritized list of improvements with specific actions.

name: Manuscript Evaluation
description: Comprehensive developmental edit of complete manuscript. Run after completing all chapters.

name: Dev Edit Structure
description: Deep dive into story structure and plot architecture.

name: Pacing Review
description: Analyze and optimize story pacing and rhythm.

name: Opening Critique
description: Intensive review of first chapter/pages for hook strength.

name: Revision Roadmap
description: Create prioritized revision plan from editorial feedback.

name: Line Edit Chapter
description: Complete line edit of chapter for prose quality.

name: Prose Polish
description: Polish prose for publication readiness.

name: Dialogue Tightening
description: Tighten and sharpen dialogue.

name: Description Refinement
description: Refine descriptive passages for clarity and impact.

name: Rhythm Analysis
description: Analyze and improve prose rhythm.

name: Copy Edit Chapter
description: Complete copy edit of chapter for correctness.

name: Style Sheet
description: Create manuscript style sheet.

name: Consistency Pass
description: Check consistency across manuscript.

name: Fact Check
description: Verify facts and references.

name: Final Proof
description: Final proofread before publication.

name: Market Analysis
description: Analyze market positioning and competition.

name: Query Letter
description: Craft query letter for agents.

name: Synopsis
description: Write compelling synopsis.

name: Publishing Path
description: Evaluate traditional vs. self-publishing.

name: Launch Plan
description: Create book launch strategy.

name: Adapt to Screenplay
description: Adapt existing story, novel, or idea into screenplay format.

name: Write Screenplay
description: Write original screenplay from concept or outline.

name: Write Scene (Screenplay)
description: Write individual screenplay scene with proper formatting.

name: Screenplay Structure
description: Analyze or create screenplay structure with beat sheet.

name: Screenplay Dialogue Pass
description: Polish screenplay dialogue for subtext and speakability.

name: Create Musical Brief
description: Start here for musical theatre — guided 6-step creation of the Musical Bible from concept through to structure and song placement sketch.

name: Musical Structure
description: Design two-act musical structure with song placement map and beat sheet — opening number through finale.

name: Write Book Scene
description: Write individual musical theatre book scene in industry-standard libretto format.

name: Dialogue to Song
description: Identify the moment dialogue must become song using the Song Trigger Framework and create a song brief for the lyricist.

name: Create Song Sheet
description: Create per-song document capturing dramatic function, trigger, voice, form, and lyric draft.

name: Write Lyric
description: Write complete musical theatre lyric from song brief with proper craft: form, prosody, rhyme, character voice, and dramatic arc.

name: Lyric Polish
description: Polish lyric for prosody, rhyme quality, character voice, active arc, and brevity.
